description: REGRESSION: fully wired Svelte app (on:submit|preventDefault, on:click local handler, prop-origin onSaved callback, navigation anchor). Level 3.5 must NOT false-positive on Svelte binding syntax.
notes: This is the live regression test for the Phase-3 review BLOCK (React-only syntax would fail every Svelte button). Clear button = local handler (pure UI reset, no fetch — valid). onSaved() = prop-origin, parent App.svelte wires it. Both routes have callers.
